pageHeader.title: Event Store
pageHeader.description: Search and browse stored events from your assets

empty.title: No events found
empty.description: Try adjusting your filters or check back later for new events.

header.title: Event Store
header.description: This page shows all processed events from your assets. Events are stored with dynamic fields that you can filter and explore.

searchInput.title: Quick Search
searchInput.description: Type an Asset ID to quickly filter events. Press Enter to apply.

advancedFiltersBtn.title: Advanced Filters
advancedFiltersBtn.description: Open advanced filters to filter by date range, thread ID, source, and more.

advancedFiltersOpen.title: Advanced Filters Drawer
advancedFiltersOpen.description: Here you can set time ranges, include child organizations, and filter by specific identifiers. Click Apply when done.

dynamicFiltersBtn.title: Dynamic Filters
dynamicFiltersBtn.description: Open dynamic filters to filter events by the specific fields defined in the Asset Template (EVA fields).

dynamicFiltersOpen.title: Dynamic Filters Drawer
dynamicFiltersOpen.description: Select an Asset or Business Rule, and the system will load its template fields. You can then filter events by specific field values using operators like equals, greater than, range, and more.

results.title: Event Results
results.description: Events are displayed here with cursor-based pagination. Click on any event to view its full payload in the detail drawer.
